creator: zoonman@gmail.com
text:
I have gate with NAT to Internet, Squid-proxy, IPFW, Apache.

At me low-speed the allocated modem connection to a network. 

The system is reloaded at the big number of references (simultaneous
work of 10 users) to a network.

Modem Courier 35.6

Debug on the crash.
kgdb:

instruction pointer     = 0x20:0xc078d464

panic: page fault
